evals.prompt: How do I set up Rhythm signals in Salesloft to prioritize inbound leads over cold outbound tasks?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guidance on configuring Rhythm signal weighting in Salesloft, including where to find signal settings in the admin UI, how to adjust priority weights for inbound vs. outbound signals, and best practices for Rhythm configuration.

assertions.name: covers_rhythm
assertions.description: Explains Rhythm signals, prioritization, and the focus zone concept

assertions.name: has_config_steps
assertions.description: Provides step-by-step instructions with specific Salesloft UI navigation paths

assertions.name: has_best_practices
assertions.description: Includes best practices or pitfalls for Rhythm signal configuration

evals.prompt: I need to connect Salesloft to our Salesforce instance. What are the key sync settings I should configure and what are common pitfalls?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on Salesloft-Salesforce CRM sync configuration including field mapping, sync direction, conflict resolution settings, sync frequency, and common issues like duplicate records or sync conflicts.

assertions.name: covers_crm_sync
assertions.description: Addresses Salesforce sync configuration including field mapping and sync direction

assertions.name: has_pitfalls
assertions.description: Identifies common pitfalls like sync conflicts, duplicate handling, or field mapping errors

assertions.name: has_actionable_steps
assertions.description: Provides specific configuration steps, not just general advice

evals.prompt: We just bought Salesloft and I'm the admin. What should I set up first? We have 20 reps, use HubSpot as our CRM, and need call recording enabled.
evals.expected_output: A prioritized setup guide for a new Salesloft instance covering user management, CRM integration with HubSpot, call recording/Conversations configuration, team structure, and initial settings. Should address the specific context of 20 reps and HubSpot.

assertions.name: has_setup_priority
assertions.description: Provides a prioritized order for initial Salesloft configuration

assertions.name: covers_multiple_areas
assertions.description: Addresses user management, CRM sync, and Conversations/call recording setup

assertions.name: context_specific
assertions.description: Tailors advice to the stated context (20 reps, HubSpot, call recording needs)
